stemHtml: Some turbine-engined aeroplanes are fitted with trim tanks. Where are these normally placed and what is their purpose?

options.a: They are placed in the nose of the aeroplanes, and their function is to control pitch attitudes during approach.
options.b: They are placed in the fuselage close to the CG of the aeroplane, and their function is to extend its range.
options.c: They are placed in the tail of the aeroplane, and their function is to control the CG location during flight.
options.d: They are placed in the wing tips , and their function is to assist with the lateral stability of the aeroplane.
